pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 11 to 17 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run on Java 17; keeping 11 would result in incorrect bytecode or runtime incompatibility with Java 17 features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot version from 2.1.3.RELEASE to 3.3.13 to align with Java 17 requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 17 as a baseline; upgrading to 3.x is required for compatibility.
